This card provides Colorless Energy.

When you attach this card from your hand to your Active Pokémon, switch that Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Double Colorless Energy provides ColorlessColorless Energy.

Discard 2 cards from your hand. If you do, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Discard 2 cards from your hand. If you do, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, put 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Discard 2 cards from your hand. If you do, draw 4 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Draw 2 cards and heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon. If you have no cards in your deck, you can't play this card.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. If it's your first turn, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Draw 3 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Put 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Move 3 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Ultimate Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: According to the legends of Sinnoh, this Pokémon emerged from an egg and shaped all there is in this world.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Sky Judgment
attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It lives in the ozone layer far above the clouds and cannot be seen from the ground.
In its true form, it possess a huge amount of power. Legends of its avarice tell how it once carried off an entire castle to gain the treasure hidden within.

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.effect: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Oblivion Wing
attacks.effect: Attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: When this legendary Pokémon's wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.

attacks.name: Riotous Beating
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Trickster-GX
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

flavorText: It changes so it looks like its foe, tricks it, and then uses that opportunity to flee.

attacks.name: Dangerous Head
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: It pulls up its shed skin to protect itself while it kicks. The bigger the crest, the more respected it is.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.

attacks.name: Torment
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Their beautiful form comes from the muscles they have developed. They run silently in the night.

attacks.name: Tail Rap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Its cute act is a ruse. When victims let down their guard, they find their items taken. It attacks with sharp claws.

attacks.name: Cursed Drop
attacks.effect: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

attacks.name: Shadow Punch
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: It is said that Golurk were ordered to protect people and Pokémon by the ancient people who made them.
The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.

attacks.name: Stellar Reign
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an evolved Pokémon, devolve it by putting all of the Evolution cards on it into your opponent's hand.

flavorText: Generations have believed that any wish written on a note on its head will come true when it awakens.

attacks.name: Break Through
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: A highly intelligent Pokémon. By folding back its wings in flight, it can overtake jet planes.

attacks.name: Legendary Guidance
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Because it can use all kinds of moves, many scientists believe Mew to be the ancestor of Pokémon.

attacks.name: Full Burst
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage times the amount of Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Super Absorption
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psystrike-GX
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Whiny Voice
attacks.effect: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into their deck.

attacks.name: Feverish Kiss
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

attacks.name: Venomous Fang
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: The pattern on its belly appears to be a frightening face. Weak foes will flee just at the sight of the pattern.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: The older it gets, the longer it grows. At night, it wraps its long body around tree branches to rest.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Storm Blade
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with lightning. It assists those who want to build an ideal world.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Exposure to electricity from Minun and Plusle promotes blood circulation and relaxes muscles.

attacks.name: Tag Team Boost
attacks.effect: If Minun is on your Bench, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: It cheers on friends with pom-poms made of sparks. It drains power from telephone poles.

attacks.name: Booming Thunder
attacks.effect: Attach a Lightning Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It explodes in response to even minor stimuli. It is feared, with the nickname of "The Bomb Ball."
It was discovered when Poké Balls were introduced. It is said that there is some connection.

attacks.name: Powerful Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage times the amount of Lightning Energy attached to your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Voltail-GX
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavorText: A plan was recently announced to gather many Pikachu and make an electric power plant.

attacks.name: Dual Pump
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Quad Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It's said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.

attacks.name: Bail Out
attacks.effect: Put a Water Pokémon from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Resolute Blade
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It crosses the world, running over the surfaces of oceans and rivers. It appears at scenic waterfronts.
It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said to live in a gap in the spatial dimension parallel to ours. It appears in mythology.

attacks.name: Aqua Bomb
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.
It swims by rotating its two tails like a screw. When it dives, its flotation sac collapses.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Shocking Sting
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It usually moves slowly, but it goes at blinding speed when it attacks and bites prey.
If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.
It is small but rough and tough. It won't hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

attacks.name: Profane Punch
attacks.effect: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Flare Blitz
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it's not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer's orders with complete nonchalance.

attacks.name: Swagger
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.
While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scorching Breath
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with fire. It helps those who want to build a world of truth.
A sea of fire engulfs the surroundings of their battles, since they use their six wings to scatter their ember scales.
Said to have been born from the sun, it spews fire from its horns and encases itself in a cocoon of fire when it evolves.

attacks.name: High-Pressure Heat
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's High-Pressure Heat attack does 50 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Coal is the source of Torkoal's energy. Large amounts of coal can be found in the mountains where they live.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Brave Burn-GX
attacks.effect: This attack does 150 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Brave Burn-GX
attacks.effect: This attack does 150 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Gaia Blaster
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage times the amount of Grass Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.

attacks.name: Wrapped in Wind
attacks.effect: You may attach a basic Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pike
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Its head sprouts horns as sharp as blades. Using whirlwind-like movements, it confounds and swiftly cuts opponents.

attacks.name: Flippity Flap
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Rally Back
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during their last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

attacks.name: Flick Poison
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon. The new Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

attacks.name: Hibernation Spore
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep. Your opponent flips 2 coins instead of 1 between turns. If either of them is tails, that Pokémon is still Asleep.

flavorText: Its short arms stretch when it throws punches. Its technique is equal to that of pro boxers.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It prefers damp places. By day it remains still in the forest shade. It releases toxic powder from its head.
By spreading the broad petals of its flower and catching the sun's rays, it fills its body with power.

attacks.name: Toxic Whip
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

flavorText: There is a plant bulb on its back. When it absorbs nutrients, the bulb is said to blossom into a large flower.
A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.
